Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 218 [Malku = Šarru 2][via cams/gkab]

fragment
fragmentfragment NaN  (start of obverse missing)
fragment 1'fragment 1'

[a]-⸢pu*-tu₂⸣

[...]

Please! = [...]

fragment 2'2'

[a]-⸢pu⸣-tu₂

la te-[eg-gi]

Please! = do not be negligent!

fragment 3'3'

[a]-nu-um-ma

MIN<(la)> te-eg-gi

Now = ditto (do not be negligent!)

fragment 4'4'

[ḫu]-⸢te⸣-en-<<te>>-zu-u

ši-tap-pu-[ṣu]

To go lame = to become fat.

fragment 5'5'

[ḫu]-te-en-<<te>>-zu-u

ḫa-la-⸢qu⸣

To go lame = to grapple.

fragment 6'6'

⸢nar₃⸣-qu-u

MIN<(ḫa-la-qu)>

To take refuge = ditto (to get lost).

fragment 7'7'

⸢uk⸣-kuš

dup-pir

To expel = move away!

fragment 8'8'

qu-⸢um⸣-mu-u

ana za-qi₂-qi₂ tur-ru

To burn up = to become the wind.

fragment 9'9'

[uk]-⸢ku⸣-du

šum-su-ku

To revile = to consider as bad.

fragment 10'10'

[uk]-⸢ku⸣-du

ṭu-up-pu-⸢lu⸣

To revile = to disdain.

fragment 11'11'

[...]

mu-ur-ri-⸢ḫu⸣

[...] = urgent.

(rest of surface missing)
